title: Minimum Swaps to Make Strings Equal
hints: Focus on positions where s1 and s2 differ; matching positions require no swaps. Count how many differ with 'x' in s1 versus 'y' in s1.
The total number of mismatched positions must be even for a solution to exist. Group mismatches into pairs to minimize swaps.
Swapping two 'x-y' mismatches fixes both in one move. Swapping an 'x-y' with a 'y-x' fixes both in two moves. Prioritize the cheaper option.
